---
title: "Publication"
---

## Why This Section Exists

This section is not here to turn the site into a prestige machine.

It exists because many learners eventually need to understand how strong papers are assembled:

- how claims are framed
- how theorems and experiments support each other
- how positioning and evidence shape reviewer trust

## First Publication Guides

- [Venue Map](venue-map.qmd)
- [Claim-Evidence Matrix](claim-evidence-matrix.qmd)
- [How Top-Venue Papers Are Shaped](how-top-venue-papers-are-shaped.qmd)
- [Theorem-to-Experiment Alignment](theorem-to-experiment-alignment.qmd)
